title: Why Xylem Stock Crashed 10% Today
text: The water technology company missed the guidance that management set just a few months ago.

title: Xylem Inc. (XYL) CEO Patrick Decker on Q4 2021 Results - Earnings Call Transcript
text: Xylem Inc. (XYL) CEO Patrick Decker on Q4 2021 Results - Earnings Call Transcript

title: Xylem (XYL) Tops Q4 Earnings Estimates, Hurt by Supply Woes
text: Xylem's (XYL) Q4 earnings reflect the impacts of the weak Measurement & Control Solutions segment and supply-chain woes. It expects 1H22 performance to suffer from supply woes.

title: Xylem (XYL) Beats Q4 Earnings and Revenue Estimates
text: Xylem (XYL) delivered earnings and revenue surprises of 1.61% and 2.29%, respectively, for the quarter ended December 2021. Do the numbers hold clues to what lies ahead for the stock?

title: Xylem Stock Falls As FY22 Outlook Lags Consensus
text: Xylem Inc XYL reported a fourth-quarter FY21 revenue decline of 3.6% year-over-year to $1.32 billion, beating the consensus of $1.31 billion. Sales by segments: Water Infrastructure $622 million (+1% Y/Y), Applied Water $406 million (+2.8% Y/Y), and Measurement & Control Solutions $295 million (-18.5% Y/Y).

title: Xylem Reports Fourth Quarter and Full-Year 2021 Earnings
text: RYE BROOK, N.Y.--(BUSINESS WIRE)-- #LetsSolveWater--Xylem Reports Fourth Quarter and Full-Year 2021 Earnings

title: Will High Demand & Supply Woes Impact Xylem's (XYL) Q4 Earnings?
text: Xylem's (XYL) Q4 results are likely to reflect gains from strengthening demand in end markets and operational execution. Inflationary pressure and supply-chain restrictions might have weighed on it.
